title: Kubb Parser Registry
description: Schema for the aggregated Kubb parser registry. Each entry extends the per-parser schema with NPM-derived stats and timestamps.

parsers.description: Array of parser metadata. Each entry is a per-parser record extended with `stats`, `updated`, and `created`.

categories.description: Distinct parser categories present in the registry.

registryParser.description: A parser entry as it appears in the aggregated registry: the canonical parser schema plus runtime-derived stats and publish timestamps.

updated.description: Publish date of the latest version on NPM (UTC ISO string).

created.description: Publish date of the first version on NPM (UTC ISO string).

stats.description: Runtime-derived metrics fetched from NPM and GitHub during registry generation.

stars.description: GitHub star count for the parser's repository.

bundleSize.description: Unpacked package size in bytes (from the latest NPM version).
